Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc Dba Great Collections' Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Application For Right To Attach Order and For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
